sourceIncludeGraph: PROVEN (src/config_graph.rs): symlink detection, source/include graph with depth+cycle limits, canonicalization, management hints
writeTarget: PROVEN: gated scalar save writes only the ConfigDiscovery-resolved active config; the pending diff shows the real target path (b-03-saveonly-pending-page.png)
duplicateDetection: PROVEN: dashboard 'Needs attention' card surfaces settings appearing more than once; the save-only diff shows duplicate context drawn from the live file

luaHandling.finding: this lua-configured Hyprland fork sets some options outside the parsed .conf. The app never turns a runtime-only lua value into a fake config write; save-only drafts write a real .conf line through the gate and do not claim to edit lua source.
luaHandling.generatedBlockOwnership: NOT implemented this pass — save-only writes go to the discovered active .conf, not an owned generated block; owning a generated block to override lua-only values is future work
